heading: Payments; Federal share; limitation
label: 3988 Payments; Federal share; limitation
notes: Amendments1988—Subsecs. (a)(3), (b). substituted “part” for “subchapter”.Pub. L. 100–4181985—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “Secretary” for “Foundation”.Pub. L. 99–159
amendments: Amendments1988—Subsecs. (a)(3), (b). substituted “part” for “subchapter”.Pub. L. 100–4181985—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “Secretary” for “Foundation”.Pub. L. 99–159

children.text: The Secretary shall pay, to each applicant having an application approved under , the Federal share of the cost of the program described in the application.section 3987 of this title
The Federal share for each fiscal year shall be 50 per centum.
The non-Federal share of payments under this part may be in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services.

children.heading: Fiscal year State limitation
children.label: b Fiscal year State limitation
children.text: Not more than 15 per centum of the funds appropriated under this part in any fiscal year may be paid to applicants in any single State.
